query: SELECT c.id, c.firstName, c.lastName, c.email, c.jobTitle, c.caseId, cc.email as portalEmail, cc.id as credId FROM contacts c LEFT JOIN client_credentials cc ON cc.contact_id = c.id WHERE c.firstName LIKE '%Barf%' OR c.lastName LIKE '%Nuggets%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2hQLtGFTQQF4sFv.root --database gixQA33Udhd38D2dSPdEnX --execute SELECT c.id, c.firstName, c.lastName, c.email, c.jobTitle, c.caseId, cc.email as portalEmail, cc.id as credId FROM contacts c LEFT JOIN client_credentials cc ON cc.contact_id = c.id WHERE c.firstName LIKE '%Barf%' OR c.lastName LIKE '%Nuggets%' LIMIT 10;
